Red Dragonscale Armor  
 


Slot: CHEST
AC: 21
STR: +20
SV FIRE: +10 SV MAGIC: +10
WT: 2.5 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG BER
Race: ALL except IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Red Dragonscale Armor

Slot: CHEST
AC: 21
STR: +20
SV FIRE: +10 SV MAGIC: +10
WT: 2.5 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG BER
Race: ALL except IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Plate
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):200, 50, 50
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:44 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:1554

Lucy Entry By:Kerasota

Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-11 08:43:52
Page Updated:Sun Apr 23rd, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Ultra Rare
Level to Attain: 45

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Red Dragonscale Armor

Zone(s) Found In:

The Rathe Mountains

# Dec 27 2002 at 2:02 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591755751308
95 posts
Personally I think it's insane to use red scale for this BP, the scale sold alone is worth more than the BP, and you can easily buy better with the cash you get from scale. So no, the PC isn't wrong, for stats that is how much it's worth. I wouldn't expect to see many of these though because most people have enough brains to let the red scales go to warriors or bards (for epic) on naggy/talendor/ragefire raids.

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 12 2002 at 12:01 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) think about it, its a typo, if you are an iksar, with the scales and all, would be considered a reptile, now, with this info we would have to conclude that when a reptile is covered with something it cant regulate its temperature, leaving the thing overheating and therefor, dieing.
RE: Pricing is off
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2001 at 2:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770418161
9 posts
I play on Xegony server, where the people are cool and the prices are bottom of the barrel...except on this item. Recently, hoping I could deck out my Ranger in this VERY nice (VERY VERY nice looking) Breastplate, I was shocked at the obscene price tag. It was going for around
12-18k platinum, far out of my normal price range and I am far from poor. I asked why the heck it was so expensive and when the famous Barbed Ringmail (30ac, +9STR, +50HP) was only 7-9k. The response I got was that the added 11 STR and the two resists made up for the -9ac -50HP drop from otherwise not wearing the Barbed. I know the scale is rare, and an important part of an epic...but does that justify the price when most Bards and Warriors that I know HAVEN'T started their epic, thus making the only logical reason for the scale to be used is to create the BP? Pretty much what I am asking for is a firm justification of why the price is so high.
Thank you.

-Vanyarian Singollo-Ranger of Tunare
"All that is gold does not glitter, All that wander are not lost"
▲ Page top
RE: Pricing is off
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2002 at 3:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966051963
44 posts
It's called supply and demand. warrriors and bards have the biggest demand, so that means that their is not that large of a supply to make this!
▲ Page top
RE: Pricing is off
QuoteReply
# Dec 22 2001 at 12:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772015958
84 posts
Well I'm a ranger also and would like one of these, but wars need the scale for epics. Now since a guild would raid naggy wouldn't there be a war tanking? They most likely would have their epic though, so it would go to the war who won the roll. That's pretty much the reason why it goes for so much.
▲ Page top
RE: Pricing is off
QuoteReply
# Dec 31 2001 at 5:34 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591756133734
70 posts
Go on a Naggy raid and the main tank will not have his epic, if he does he's the luckiest SOB to play eq. Warrior epic is hard, and you cannot fight naggy (you can be there, but certainly not tank) Naggy if you have reached 53rd level.. Warrior epic is hard, taking you to plenty of Naggy raids considering the number of warriors who need the scale, the 7th island of Plane of Air and Severillious. Not to mention the Hand of the maestro. 52 warrior with epic? not likely.
▲ Page top
RE: Pricing is off

# Feb 26 2002 at 8:59 AM Rating: Default

21 posts
There is a sad little twink of a warrior on Vallon Zek with his epic. His friends multiquested almost the entire thing for him. He's lvl 51.

# Aug 21 2003 at 1:30 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255930943
720 posts
you can get the red dragon scale from 2 other mobs then naggy. Sheesh do research before posting useless info =P

You can get a red dragon scale from Naggy or Ragefire OR a named mob in the hole who is a alternative kill for the bard epic....

As for the green scale you get it from servilous in EJ....

The warrior epic is ALOT easier then the SK or Monk epic... get over it =P only part hard is finding the help killing some of these mobs to get yer items you need....

Edited, Thu Aug 21 02:29:06 2003

Rarity
QuoteReply
# Nov 15 2001 at 6:57 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591762681291
91 posts
I dunno about the dark red plate thing, i remember this looking light red. One of the reasons its so ultra rare is the red dragonscale used to make it usually go to a warrior or bard epic when they kill naggy, or if they let others roll on scale, it goes to some high level warrior or bard who buys it off the winner. Rarely is this bp made any more.

QuoteReply
# May 23 2001 at 1:26 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
How is the price on this thing justified?

I bought Treeweave for 2k; this is apparently like 15k-20k. So people are paying 13-18k for 10 strength, 10 fire and 10 magic, with worse AC?

Treeweave looks like hell, especially on ogres, but I'll take the treeweave and the fbss I could get for the money over this thing. Especially since it's becoming more and more clear just how little impact strength really has above certain pretty low thresholds.
▲ Page top

# Jun 02 2001 at 2:35 PM Rating: Good

View User Forum
Anonymous
This is one of those items that is such a ***** to get, its basically a status symbol.
As to the Iksar issue, well its just a trade off. my iksar just used banded til i did my quest armor. After that, i just have to wait til i can go on Planes raids or hunt in places like Old Seb, Karnors and such.

And BTW there are some very nice chain mail items that Iksars can use, LOTS of new Velious stuff is iksar usable. just stop whinning about not getting plate mail and search for stuff you CAN use!
